_comment: Illustrative GitHub PR pool for the Smashing demo. generate-demo-data.js picks one per snapshot deterministically (hash of snapshot date), rotates the date into the snapshot window, synthesizes a PR number incrementing weekly, and merges into changes.json. Pool covers ~6 months of weekly snapshots without repeats. Categories are advisory only -- the dashboard's inference engine scores each title independently. Each item: title, author, optional category tag for human reference.
